name: ddl-table-generator
description: Generate CREATE TABLE statements for entities with columns, constraints, and foreign keys
acceptanceCriteria: generateCreateTable(model, dialect) returns SQL CREATE TABLE statement
Table name uses 1:1 mapping with model name (no pluralization) per design-ddl-table-naming
Columns generated from properties using type-mapper.mapPropertyType()
PRIMARY KEY constraint added for identifier property
NOT NULL constraints added based on constraint-builder.inferNotNull()
CHECK constraints added for enum properties
Returns TableDef structure matching types.ts interface
PostgreSQL: FK constraints via ALTER TABLE (separate from CREATE TABLE)
SQLite: FK constraints inline in CREATE TABLE definition
